tasks.label: Dev: backend (watch)
tasks.detail: Restarts the API when you save backend files (nest start --watch).

tasks.label: Dev: frontend-web (HMR)
tasks.detail: Hot reload in the browser when you save web files (next dev).

tasks.label: Dev: mobile-app (Fast Refresh)
tasks.detail: Reloads the app when you save mobile files (expo start).
